checkout.title: Siparişin

account.title: Hesabın
account.sign_in: Sign in to manage your profile, track orders, and access your wallet.
account.allergen_note: Cooks are shown a warning when their dish matches your allergens.

account.back_kitchen_sub: Manage your menu, orders and earnings
account.delete_confirm: This will permanently delete your account and all associated data. This cannot be undone.

account.health_conditions_hint: Select conditions that apply to you. Health Kitchen creators can use this to tailor meal plans.

certifications.title: Sertifikalar
certifications.intro: Upload your food safety and business documents. Our team reviews each submission within 3-5 business days. Approved certifications appear as badges on your storefront.
certifications.food_safety_desc: NAFDAC, HACCP, or local food safety cert
certifications.health_desc: Certificate from a licensed health authority
certifications.culinary_desc: Professional culinary school or chef certificate
certifications.nafdac_desc: NAFDAC product registration or facility approval
certifications.permit_desc: Any government-issued kitchen or food handling permit
certifications.submitted_ok: Your document is under review. We will notify you within 3-5 business days.

dish_form.required_ingredient: Yayınlamadan önce en az bir malzeme ekle

dish_form.dietary_labels_hint: Özel beslenme ihtiyacı olan müşterilerin bu yemeği bulmasına yardımcı ol

dispute.title: İtiraz Aç
dispute.protection_text: İnceleme sürerken ödemen korunuyor. Bu durumu 48 saat içinde çözeceğiz.
dispute.placeholder: örn. Tavuklu Jollof Pilavı sipariş ettim ama proteinsiz Kızarmış Pirinç geldi. Yemek ayrıca soğuk gelmişti...
dispute.hint: Ayrıntılı ol — ne sipariş ettiğini ve ne aldığını belirt.
dispute.resolution: 48 saat içinde çözüm. Her iki taraf da bilgilendirilecek ve kanıt sunması istenecek.
dispute.no_evidence: Henüz kanıt yüklenmedi. Durumunu desteklemek için fotoğraf veya belge yükle.
dispute.permission_required_body: Kanıt eklemek için fotoğraf galerisi erişimine izin ver.

gifting.reject_meal_hint: Aşçıya nedenini söyle — sana başka bir seçenek önerecek.
gifting.reject_reason_placeholder: örn. alıcı deniz ürünlerine alerjik, vejetaryen tercih ediyor…
gifting.type_daily_desc: Belirli bir programa göre teslim edilen ev yemekleri
gifting.type_senior_desc: Yaşlı alıcılar için özel hazırlanmış besleyici yemekler
gifting.type_wellness_desc: Fitness ve sağlıklı yaşam hedefleri için sağlık odaklı yemekler
gifting.type_office_desc: İş yerine düzenli olarak teslim edilen yemekler
gifting.type_birthday_desc: Özel bir günü kutlamak için kısa bir yemek planı
gifting.type_family_desc: Tüm bir hane için ayarlanmış boyut ve programda yemekler
gifting.title: Gifting
gifting.subtitle: Give the gift of real home-cooked food
gifting.card_note: Gift cards never expire and can be redeemed on any order.
gifting.plan_being_set_up: {{who}} {{plan}} meal plan is being set up.
gifting.foods_assigns_cooks: FOODS will assign and rotate the best available cooks.
gifting.nutritionist_reach_out: A nutritionist will reach out within 24 hours to plan the menu.
gifting.view_schedules_hint: View meal schedules, approve or reject meals in the My Plans tab.
gifting.choose_plan_hint: Choose the plan that fits the recipient best.
gifting.foods_matching_desc: We match and rotate the best available home cooks based on availability, location, and dietary needs — so meals are always fresh and reliable.
gifting.select_meal_hint: Select at least one meal to continue.
gifting.dietician_desc: A certified nutritionist designs every meal for specific health goals and restrictions.
gifting.preferences_placeholder: e.g. no pork, prefers Yoruba cuisine, diabetic-friendly, low sodium, nut allergy…
gifting.preferences_note: These notes go to the assigned cook and nutritionist (if added). The more detail you provide, the better the meals.
gifting.nutritionist_review_notes: A nutritionist will review these notes and reach out within 24 hours.
gifting.assign_rotate_desc: FOODS will assign and rotate the best available cooks. You'll always see who is cooking each meal.
gifting.view_approve_hint: You can view every meal {{who}} being fed and approve or reject meals from the My Plans tab.
gifting.no_active_plans_sub: Subscriptions you gift will appear here with full meal schedules.
gifting.no_meals_scheduled_sub: Your cook will upload the meal schedule before deliveries begin. You'll be notified when it's ready.
gifting.redeem_note: Credits are added instantly to your wallet and applied to your next order.

health_specs.specialisations_hint: Destekleyebileceğin her durumu veya beslenme tarzını seç.

creator_branding.cover_image_sub: Vitrininde ve paylaşılan bağlantılarda üstte gösterilir. Önerilen: 1200×630

bookings.title: Event bookings
bookings.hire: Hire a cook for your event

bookings.quote_desc: Cook reviews your brief and sends a price
bookings.deposit_desc: Secure your date with a deposit
bookings.no_bookings_body: Your event enquiries will appear here once you send one.

cook_settings.partial_save_body: {{count}} section(s) could not be saved. Please try again.
cook_settings.guest_tiers_hint: Set a rate per head or flat rate for each guest range.

analytics.title: Creator Insights
analytics.no_data_body: Analytics build up as you take orders and engage with customers.

analytics.insight_content_reach: Your content reached {{count}} people this period.
analytics.insight_engagements: Your content drove {{count}} engagements this period.

analytics.no_follower_data_body: Follower growth will appear here as your audience grows.
